title: E2E scenario manifest
description: Schema for scenario.json files used by the network-protocol e2e test framework.

mode.description: mock-server: TypeScript acts as the external service; client: TypeScript connects to a running service

services.description: Required for mock-server mode. One entry per service to impersonate.

url.description: Required for client mode. WebSocket URL of the target service. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.

sequence.description: Ordered list of steps to execute.

action.description: send: send file JSON to the connected peer; receive: wait for one message and validate it; receive-stream: collect messages until the terminal message arrives

service.description: mock-server mode only. Name of the service whose socket to use.

file.description: Filename of the JSON payload (relative to the scenario directory). Required for send; used for matchFields on receive.

schema.description: Path to the JSON schema to validate the message against, relative to SCHEMAS_DIR.

matchFields.description: Subset of top-level fields to compare on receive (ignores dynamic values like UUIDs/timestamps).

until.description: receive-stream only. Filename of the terminal message that ends the stream.

terminalSchema.description: receive-stream only. Schema path (relative to SCHEMAS_DIR) to validate the terminal message against.
